title: Avala Nambithan Lyrics Salim Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Avala Nambithan
Singer(s): Emcee Jesz, Mahalingam
Movie: Salim
Lyrics: Gaana Bala

Sambo ......  o...o o o o
Sambo ......Siva sambo ..
siva sambo ..siva sambo .

Avala Nambithan naasamaayitten
mosam poyitten siva sambo.
Aasa kaattithaan aala maathittaa
kaala vaarittaa sivasambo.

Facebook-ula photo pottuthaan
tata kaattina siva sambo.
Aasa kaattithaan aala maathittaa
kaala vaarittaa sivasambo.

Ayyo love-ula iranginaa
namakkuthaan tensionu.
Boy friend-nu solluvaa
adhuthaanda fashionu.
cell-ula koduppaada
unakkuthaan torture-u.
avala nambiththaan ponaanle
poyidum future-u.

Enakkaaga porandhaanu irundhenda kaavalu
ava evankooda poraalo bike-la travelu
ava ketkkum six pack-u illada enkitta
adha vachaale povada seekkiram emankitta.

Avala Nambithan naasamaayitten
mosam poyitten siva sambo.
Aasa kaattithaan aala maathittaa
kaala vaarittaa sivasambo.

Facebook-ula photo pottuthaan
tata kaattina siva sambo.
Aasa kaattithaan aala maathittaa
kaala vaarittaa sivasambo.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Avala Nambithan'?

The song 'Avala Nambithan' expresses a playful and upbeat vibe, reflecting themes of love and celebration.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Salim'?

The movie 'Salim' revolves around the life of a young man and his adventures, with the song capturing the essence of his joyful experiences.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features vocals by Emcee Jazz and Mahalingam, who bring a lively energy to the track.

When was 'Avala Nambithan' released?

'Avala Nambithan' was released on June 9, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie *Salim*, the song 'Avala Nambithan' serves as a lively celebration of love and joy. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of happiness and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. The playful nature of the song reflects the protagonist's carefree spirit and adds a vibrant touch to the film's narrative. Overall, it captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the joy of living in the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Avala Nambithan from Salim is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the unique collaboration between Emcee Jazz and Mahalingam. With catchy lyrics by Gaana Bala, this song is sure to get you moving and grooving. Dive into the lively beats and feel the infectious joy that this song brings!
stanzaMeanings: A song about a person named Sambo.
I trusted her, but it turned out to be a disaster. She showed her desires and changed her ways.
She posted a photo on Facebook, showing off. She showed her desires and changed her ways.
Oh no, if love starts, we will be in tension. She will call me her boyfriend, that's the new trend. If I give her my phone, it will be torture for me. Trusting her could ruin my future.
I was born for her, but she might go with someone else. Traveling on a bike, she will ask for a six-pack, and if I show it to her, she will leave quickly.
I trusted her, but it turned out to be a disaster. She showed her desires and changed her ways.
She posted a photo on Facebook, showing off. She showed her desires and changed her ways.
